name: Do-it-Yourself Peanut Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the peanuts and 1-1/2 tablespoons of peanut oil.
2. Blend the mixture until it is smooth.
3. Gradually add another 1-1/2 tablespoons of oil to achieve the desired consistency for the peanut butter.
4. If using unsalted peanuts, add 1/2 teaspoon of salt.
